criteria.reason: Preview input now carries connector_action_handlers from selected provider-route contracts.
OpenClaw policy-bound routes are converted into openclaw_preview_routes and deduped into openclaw_action_plan.
Safe preview runs create localos_openclaw_preview_observations_v1 artifacts.
The preview artifact records that external side effects are disallowed and no external action executed.
Dry-run OpenClaw route observation does not call the ActionOrchestrator.
Focused tests, full agent blueprint suite, and frontend build passed.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py -k 'preview_run_input_is_safe or openclaw_preview_observations or preview_run_and_activation' -x
